title: Social Selfie AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Reference Role: Use Image 1 as the only identity source. Preserve the same adult woman across both panels: long black hair, defined brows, black blazer, white cropped tank, high-waisted jeans, confident soft smile, and overall face shape. Format: Two-panel vertical social cartoon with a hard center divider. Both panels must clearly be the same person, same outfit, same hair, same accessories, same skin tone. Left Panel: Caption "My mirror:". Show a clean best-angle hallway mirror selfie with relaxed confidence and phone held to one side, flattering eye-level angle, smooth simplified lighting. Right Panel: Caption "Tagged photo:". Show a wide-angle friend photo with startled eyes, flash, awkward hand blur, and slightly distorted phone perspective, but keep the joke kind and recognizable. Background Pair: sleek apartment hallway versus crowded night-out snapshot, simplified enough for webcomic readability. source identity: same adult woman from the uploaded mirror selfie: long black hair, defined brows, black blazer, white cropped tank, high-waisted jeans, confident soft smile. outfit lock: black blazer, white cropped tank, high-waisted jeans, long black hair visible in both panels. humor tone: relatable online/offline contrast, playful but not cruel. Style: bold black outlines, flat cel-shaded color, modern avatar/webcomic look, crisp facial expressions, no gradients, no photorealism. Caption Control: only the two short captions, large and readable, no other text. Restrictions: same person in both panels, no hateful caricature, no body-shaming cruelty, no random text, no unreadable captions, no different hairstyle or outfit.

imagePrompts.prompt: Reference Role: Use Image 1 as the only identity source. Preserve the same adult woman across both panels: long black hair, glossy lips, black blazer, white top, slim high-waisted jeans, calm confident gaze, same earrings, and same face shape. Format: Two-panel square social cartoon with a clean center divider. Both panels must clearly be the same person, same outfit, same hair silhouette, and same facial feature pattern. Left Panel: Caption "Profile pic:". Show a polished elevator mirror selfie with perfect posture, soft flash, confident expression, and tidy composition. Right Panel: Caption "Group chat:". Show a mid-laugh candid from below with windblown hair, phone flash, and one hand half-blocking the frame, exaggerated but still attractive and recognizable. Background Pair: elevator mirror versus cafe table snapshot, simplified enough for webcomic readability. source identity: same adult woman from the uploaded mirror selfie: long black hair, glossy lips, black blazer, white top, slim high-waisted jeans, calm confident gaze. mirror pose: polished elevator mirror selfie with perfect posture and soft flash. outfit lock: same blazer, same white top, same jeans, same hair silhouette, same earrings in both panels. humor tone: light self-deprecating social media reality joke. Style: bold black outlines, flat cel-shaded color, modern avatar/webcomic look, crisp expressions, no gradients, no photorealism. Caption Control: only the two short captions, large and readable, no other text. Restrictions: same person in both panels, no hateful caricature, no body-shaming cruelty, no random text, no unreadable captions, no different hairstyle or outfit.
